1724310.name: Uncrowned
1724310.description:
Play with friends
- Uncrowned is fully co-op up to an unlimited amount of players. The game is currently balanced around 4 player co-op having more players may lead to unintended outcomes.

Start from nothing
  • Uncrowned is all about turning yourself from an unknown sailor to a well respected noble or pirate.

    Colonize
    • Found new colonies and grow them.
    • Manage buildings and what goods you want to make.
    • Manage different types of residents and seek new colonists.

    Combat
    • Ship to ship combat
    • Different ammo types

    Living world
    • AI merchants travel and trade, protected by naval ships, hunted by pirates
    • In depth sailing/wind mechanisms
    • Dynamic trade systems

    However you choose to venture Uncrowneds vast ocean just remember to pay your taxes!

    Uncrowned is a solo developed game from assets to code.
